name: Mahatma Gandhi
contributions: Led India's independence movement through nonviolent civil disobedience.
quote: Be the change that you wish to see in the world.

name: Bhagat Singh
contributions: A charismatic Indian revolutionary who became a hero of the independence movement.
quote: They may kill me, but they cannot kill my ideas.

name: Subhas Chandra Bose
contributions: Indian nationalist whose defiant patriotism made him a hero in India.
quote: Give me blood and I will give you freedom!

name: Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel
contributions: Played a leading role in the country's struggle for independence and guided its integration into a united, independent nation.
quote: Faith is of no evil in absence of strength. Faith and strength, both are essential to accomplish any great work.

name: Rani Lakshmibai
contributions: One of the leading figures of the Indian Rebellion of 1857 and became a symbol of resistance to the British Raj.
quote: I shall not surrender my Jhansi.
